'Ndrina Grande Aracri.description: The 'Ndrina Grande Aracri is a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cutro, Calabria, Italy. It operates extensively in northern Italy (Emilia-Romagna, Veneto, Lombardy) and abroad in Germany. The group is involved in drug trafficking, false invoicing, extortion targeting tourist villages, and construction fraud. It emerged in the 1980s under Nicolino Grande Aracri and has been engaged in feuds with rival families.

descriptions: Dragone and Grande Aracri were in conflict in the Cutro feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Cutro: combattuta tra la fine degli anni '90 e i primi del 2000, ha visto scontrarsi i Dragone e i Grande Aracri.

descriptions: Dragone and Grande Aracri were in a feud in 2004.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 10 maggio 2004 viene ucciso Antonio Dragone e in seguito il suo genero Gaetano Ciampà . La faida riprende nel 2004 con l'omicidio di Franco Arena scoppia una faida fra gli Arena -Dragone e i Nicoscia - Grande Aracri.

descriptions: The Giglio are allied with the Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri e dei Mannolo di Cutro , dei Farao-Marincola di Cirò e dei Levato.

descriptions: FK and FOB were rival gangs engaged in a gang war.
edges.evidence_quote: Between 2002 and 2009, there was a bloody gang war between two rival East Asian gangs the FK and FOB gangs which resulted in 25 gang related murders.

descriptions: United Nations imported Fresh Off the Boat Killers as assassins to target the Bacon brothers.
edges.evidence_quote: Roueche imported several Fresh Off the Boat Killers from Calary, most notably Billy Ly and Troy Tran, to assist with killing the Bacon brothers.

Milenio Cartel.description: The Milenio Cartel was a Mexican criminal organization based in Michoacán and later Jalisco, founded by the Valencia family in the late 1970s. It engaged in drug trafficking, money laundering, murder, and arms trafficking, producing marijuana and heroin. The cartel was a branch of the Sinaloa Federation until its leadership was captured in 2009-2010, leading to its dissolution and the emergence of the Jalisco New Generation Cartel.

descriptions: Colima Cartel listed as allied with Milenio Cartel in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Guadalajara Cartel Milenio Cartel Sonora Cartel

descriptions: Milenio Cartel disputed drug corridors with the Gulf Cartel in 2003.
edges.evidence_quote: One of the first missions of Los Zetas was to eradicate Los Chachos, a group of drug traffickers under the orders of the Milenio Cartel, who disputed the drug corridors of Tamaulipas with the Gulf Cartel in 2003.

edges.evidence_quote: Reports state that Los Zetas and the Milenio Cartel are responsible for the massacre of these twenty-six alleged Sinaloa Cartel members.

descriptions: Los Zetas invaded Michoacán to take control by force, leading to clashes with the Milenio Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: A partir del 2005 el grupo conocido como Los Zetas (bajo el mando del cartel del golfo) incursionaron en el estado de Michoacán para tomar el control de este por la fuerza, recrudeciendo los enfrentamientos y la violencia en el estado.

edges.evidence_quote: En 2017, se halló una narco-manta en la cual venía un mensaje claro sobre la alianza que tiene con Los Zetas, dejando así la alianza que tenía con el Cártel de Sinaloa (CDS).

descriptions: The infobox lists the Sinaloa Cartel as an ally of the Milenio Cartel.

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel allied with the Milenio Cartel.

descriptions: The Provisional IRA engaged in a violent feud with the Official IRA in 1975.
edges.evidence_quote: a feud with the Official IRA in October and November 1975 that left eleven people dead.

descriptions: The Provisional IRA split from the Official IRA in 1969, initially being the minority faction.
edges.evidence_quote: The Provisional IRA emerged in December 1969, due to a split within the previous incarnation of the IRA and the broader Irish republican movement . It was initially the minority faction in the split compared to the Official IRA but became the dominant faction by 1972.

descriptions: The Provisional IRA split from the Official IRA in 1969.
edges.evidence_quote: The Provisional IRA emerged in December 1969, due to a split within the previous incarnation of the IRA and the broader Irish republican movement.

edges.evidence_quote: These small units took up names such as Pasukan Siluman (Ghost Squad), Srigala Hitam (Black Jackal), Pemotong Leher (Neck Cutters) and Garuda Putih (White Eagle).

edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Jaysh al-Mu'ammal

descriptions: YACS served as an enforcement arm for American Mafia families, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The YACS group has also been recruited as an "enforcement arm" for American Mafia crime families.

descriptions: Hells Angels aligned with Immortals.
edges.evidence_quote: The Australian Hells Angels have aligned themselves with the Coffin Cheaters , Immortals, Red Devils , Satans Soldiers, Vikings and the Prisoners of War

Brother Speed Motorcycle Club.description: American outlaw motorcycle club formed in Boise, Idaho in 1969 by a group of high school friends. Active in Idaho, Washington, and Oregon, it has been involved in methamphetamine trafficking and alliances with other clubs like the Bandidos. The club's colors are black and gold, and its center patch features a winged skull.

descriptions: Infobox lists Brother Speed as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brother Speed MC, Chicanos MC, Diablos MC, Mobshitters MC, Outlaws MC, Rock Machine MC, Satudarah MC, X-Team, Los Zetas

descriptions: Brother Speed purchased illegal weapons from Aryan Nations members.
edges.evidence_quote: The club has purchased illegal weapons from members of Aryan Nations in northern Idaho.

descriptions: Brother Speed formed an alliance with Bandidos in early 1990s to counter Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: Fearing that their operations would be taken over by the Hells Angels, the Brother Speed strengthened by beginning an alliance with the Bandidos of Texas in the early 1990s.

descriptions: Brother Speed allegedly associated with Devils Breed to acquire methamphetamine precursor chemicals.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brother Speed has allegedly associated with the Hells Angels, the Outsiders, and the Devils Breed in order to acquire precursor chemicals used in the manufacture of methamphetamine.

descriptions: Brother Speed members attacked Empties members in May 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: In May 2012, five of the Idaho Falls members of Brother Speed, attacked two members of Pocatello's Empties motorcycle club at a gathering for a child who was suffering from cancer.

descriptions: Brother Speed allegedly associated with Hells Angels to acquire methamphetamine precursor chemicals.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brother Speed has allegedly associated with the Hells Angels, the Outsiders, and the Devils Breed in order to acquire precursor chemicals used in the manufacture of methamphetamine.

descriptions: Brother Speed allegedly associated with Outsiders to acquire methamphetamine precursor chemicals.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brother Speed has allegedly associated with the Hells Angels, the Outsiders, and the Devils Breed in order to acquire precursor chemicals used in the manufacture of methamphetamine.

descriptions: Brother Speed allegedly sent methamphetamine to Rebels in Sydney.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Speed in Idaho have allegedly been involved in sending methamphetamine, sealed inside the frames of motorcycles, to the Rebels in Sydney, Australia.

Clan Pariante.description: The Clan Pariante is a Camorra criminal organization operating in the western suburbs of Naples, specifically in the municipalities of Bacoli and Monte di Procida. Founded by Rosario Pariante, it was originally part of the Di Lauro clan before splitting in 2004, triggering the First Scampia feud. The clan is involved in drug trafficking and extortion. As of 2017, the regent is Genny Pariante, son of Rosario.

descriptions: Pariante clan became a former ally, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Former allies: Pariante clan

descriptions: Pariante clan was an ally of Scissionisti.
edges.evidence_quote: Pariante clan (Bacoli, Monte di Procida) - Boss: Rosario Pariante ... joined the scissionisti alliance in late 2004

descriptions: Pariante and others split from the Di Lauro clan, starting a conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme a Gennaro Marino e Arcangelo Abete decide la scissione dal clan

descriptions: Rosario Pariante helped Paolo Di Lauro found the Di Lauro clan, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Infatti, Pariante aiuterà Di Lauro a fondare il suo impero criminale, il clan Di Lauro.

Clan Serino.description: The Clan Serino is a Camorra organization originating from Sarno, Salerno, Italy. Founded by Aniello Serino, known as 'O' Pope', it was influential for over twenty years and affiliated with the Nuova Famiglia. The clan engaged in extortion, usury, drug trafficking, and video poker businesses, and infiltrated local government. As of 2019, it remains active but weakened.

descriptions: A member of Clan Serino killed two nephews of a Graziano member.
edges.evidence_quote: un esponente del clan Serino avrebbe ucciso nel 1989 due nipoti di uno dei membri di spicco della famiglia Graziano

descriptions: Clan Serino opposed Clan Parlato in a conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: si era contrapposta l'altra consorteria camorristica sarnese, quella facente capo alla famiglia Parlato

descriptions: Clan Serino is affiliated with Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: ai Serino (affiliati alla Nuova Famiglia)

descriptions: Serino clan was part of the anti-Cutolo alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Altre famiglie coinvolte nell'ampia alleanza anticutoliana furono ... i Serino di Sarno

Los Mexicles.description: Los Mexicles is a Mexican and Mexican-American gang founded in 1987 in Ciudad Juárez, Chihuahua. It is an armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel in the border region, involved in murder, extortion, drug trafficking, kidnapping, and vehicle theft. The gang operates primarily in several Mexican states and parts of Texas, and is known for using Nahuatl messages in U.S. prisons. Its members are mostly deportees or descendants of Mexicans, and leaving the gang is punishable by death.

descriptions: Artistas Asesinos is in continuous conflict with Los Mexicles.
edges.evidence_quote: estando en conflicto continuo con Los Mexicles y Los Chapitos.

Rollin' 90s Neighborhood Crips.description: The Rollin' 90s Neighborhood Crips are a set of the larger Crips gang alliance, based on the west side of South Los Angeles, California. Formed in the late 1970s or early 1980s, they are primarily African-American and engage in drug trafficking and murder. The gang has expanded to other U.S. cities and Canada, with a notable presence in Nashville and Montreal.

descriptions: Rollin' 60s is allied with Rollin' 90's NHC.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rollin 40's and Rollin 90's NHCs

descriptions: Infobox lists Crenshaw Mafia Gangster Bloods as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Crenshaw Mafia Gangster Bloods

descriptions: Rollin' 40s joined the alliance with Rollin' 90s and Rollin' 60s.
edges.evidence_quote: this alliance has since spread to other gangs, including the Rollin' 40s Crips

descriptions: Rollin' 90s and Rollin' 60s formed an alliance in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: the two gangs decided to unite, and this alliance has since spread to other gangs, including the Rollin' 40s Crips

descriptions: Rollin' 90s branched off from Rollin' 60s.
edges.evidence_quote: the Rollin' 90s Crips branched off from the Rollin' 60s Crips

descriptions: Licciardi and Sautto-Ciccarelli clans coordinated in the 2019 murder of Domenico Gargiulo.
edges.evidence_quote: The killing, reportedly orchestrated by both the Licciardi and Sautto-Ciccarelli clans in coordination with the Abbinante clan, was interpreted by prosecutors as both an act of strategic retribution and an assertion of territorial dominance.

descriptions: Sautto-Ciccarelli and Abbinante clans coordinated in the 2019 murder of Domenico Gargiulo.
edges.evidence_quote: The killing, reportedly orchestrated by both the Licciardi and Sautto-Ciccarelli clans in coordination with the Abbinante clan, was interpreted by prosecutors as both an act of strategic retribution and an assertion of territorial dominance.

descriptions: The Vallelunga Pratameno family participated in the murder of Giuseppe Calderone alongside the Catania family's Santapaola faction.
edges.evidence_quote: collaboration among multiple families from different provinces, all linked to the Corleonesi, underscores the coordinated effort behind Calderone’s elimination.

descriptions: Al-Muqawama al-Islamiyya is a component of Hezbollah's military branch.
edges.evidence_quote: Hezbollah has a military branch known as the Jihad Council, one component of which is Al-Muqawama al-Islamiyya ("The Islamic Resistance")

descriptions: Jousters were part of GFJ alliance with Freaks.
edges.evidence_quote: The Jousters also continued their strong unity with the Gaylords, calling this unification GFJ. This stood for Gaylords, Jousters and Freaks.

descriptions: Kavač clan cooperates with 'Ndrangheta for cocaine transit through Port of Gioia Tauro.
edges.evidence_quote: southern Italy (using Port of Gioia Tauro as a transit point of cocaine shipments, in cooperation with 'Ndrangheta)

descriptions: Kavač clan abducted the leader of Barska OCG, a constituent of rival Škaljari clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Sky ECC data has revealed that "Kavač" OCG was able to penetrate higher echelons of rival "Škaljari" OCG during 2020, by using sophisticated deception techniques. Particularly publicized case was abduction and subsequent months-long illegal detention of Mile Radulović, leader of "Barska" OCG.

descriptions: Veljko Belivuk criminal group is practically a Serbia branch of Kavač OCG.
edges.evidence_quote: Veljko Belivuk criminal group can practically be considered as a Serbia branch.

descriptions: Kavač clan maintains close links with remainders of the Šarić clan.
edges.evidence_quote: "Kavač" OCG maintains close links with remainders of the Šarić clan

descriptions: Kavač and Škaljari clans are engaged in a violent turf war over drug routes.
edges.evidence_quote: Their rivalry led to numerous murders and assassinations, not only within Montenegro but across the region, including neighboring Serbia and Croatia.
